hero.heading: Systems for ambitious software.
hero.sub: We design the brand and ship the software it runs on. Tokenized systems, production-grade engineering, four-week cycles.

b01.title: Brand strategy & positioning
b01.body: Thesis, audience, messaging pillars, tagline. Delivered as a versioned doc, not a deck.

b02.title: Tokenized identity systems
b02.body: Logo, color, type, motion — structured as tokens in a repo. Regeneratable from a prompt.

b03.title: Asset generation pipelines
b03.body: Templates, generators, and prompt libraries. Your team ships 50 variants without us.

i01.title: Product engineering
i01.body: Next.js, React, TypeScript. We build the product your brand lives in.

i02.title: Design-systems engineering
i02.body: Component libraries, token pipelines, Figma-to-code bridges. One source of truth.

i03.title: Automation & internal tooling
i03.body: Scripts, CLIs, integrations. You leave with leverage, not just a handoff.

about.heading: Built around an axis.
about.pull_quote: Most agencies hand you a PDF. We hand you a repository.
about.body: We are a small team of designers and engineers building brand systems for ambitious companies. We work in repos, ship in weeks, and measure twice.
about.p01: We design the system and the software.
about.p02: Engineering-grade precision applied to brand work.
about.p04: Tooling as a deliverable: prompt libraries, generators, CI pipelines.
about.p05: AI-native production: every asset regeneratable from tokens and prompts.

not_found.heading: That route doesn't exist.
not_found.body: The wordmark isn't lost — it's just not here.
